response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad full-stack experience including TypeScript/Node.js, cloud-adjacent work, and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the forward-deployed GenAI mandate. However, the resume lacks explicit, sustained production GenAI delivery experience — no clear evidence of 8+ years shipping AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Python is also absent from the skills list. Worth a screening call to probe depth of AI/MCP work and customer-facing technical leadership.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-adjacent delivery
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong track record of teaching, workshops, and mentoring — transferable to customer-facing FDE role
concerns: No explicit Python experience listed; JD requires Python or TypeScript proficiency with AI systems
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or evaluation-pipeline experience on the resume
Unclear evidence of 8+ years specifically building production GenAI systems vs. general full-stack work

key_factors.factor: Limited explicit GenAI/RAG/vector DB production experience
MCP and agentic workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
